Name: Average time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Total time between Manuscript Export Succeeded and SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Average time it takes Manuscript Export Succeeded to be followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Manuscript Export Succeeded and activity SW-Reviewer Agreed for cases where activity SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Total resolution time of Manuscript Export Succeeded when occurring before SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Manuscript Export Succeeded and activity SW-EIC Major Revision for cases where activity SW-EIC Major Revision occurs

Name: Time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to SW-Reviewer Agreed in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between Manuscript Export Succeeded and the first occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Average time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants containing SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time between Manuscript Export Succeeded and Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in resubmission trajectories
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Manuscript Export Succeeded and activity Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation for cases where activity Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurs

Name: Time of Manuscript Export Succeeded relative to Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation across all variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in accepted manuscripts
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Average waiting time to Manuscript Export Succeeded after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week in complex reviewer assignment variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Elapsed time between Manuscript Export Succeeded and Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist in rejected cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Manuscript Export Succeeded and activity Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist for cases where activity Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist occurs

Name: Total time it takes Manuscript Export Succeeded to be followed by Awaiting Assignment to Batch in final acceptance paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'
